title: Little Bird Cookie Cutter | 3D Printed PLA Baking Tool | 7-8cm Medium Size | Cute Birdie Fondant Stamp Kitchen Accessory
description:
Bring a touch of whimsy to your baking with our adorable Little Bird Cookie Cutter! This charming bird-shaped cutter is perfect for creating delightful cookies, fondant decorations, and craft projects that will have everyone chirping with joy. Whether you are preparing a batch of sugar cookies for a spring celebration, decorating a nature-themed cake, or simply looking for a fun way to engage the kids in the kitchen, this little bird design adds personality and charm to every creation.

Features:
Our Little Bird Cookie Cutter is carefully designed to capture the sweet silhouette of a small bird, complete with a rounded body, tiny beak, and a perky tail. The cutter produces clean, precise outlines every time, making it easy to cut through cookie dough, fondant, modeling clay, and even craft foam. The cutting edge is sharp enough to deliver crisp details while remaining safe to handle. The design includes a comfortable pressing surface on top, ensuring even pressure distribution so your shapes come out perfectly every single time. Each cutter is printed with care using high-quality materials and undergoes a quality check before shipping.

Dimensions:
This is our Medium (M) size, measuring approximately 7-8cm (2.8-3.1 inches) at its widest point. This versatile size is ideal for standard cookies, cupcake toppers, and decorative fondant pieces. It is large enough to showcase the charming bird details while being perfectly proportioned for everyday baking needs.

How to Use:
Lightly dust your work surface and rolling pin with flour or powdered sugar to prevent sticking. Roll out your dough or fondant to an even thickness of approximately 3-5mm. Press the cookie cutter firmly and evenly into the dough, then lift straight up for the cleanest cut. If dough sticks to the cutter, dip the cutting edge lightly in flour between uses. For best results with intricate details, chill your dough for a few minutes before cutting.

Care Instructions:
Printed in food-safe PLA. Hand wash only – not dishwasher safe. Do not use in microwave or oven. After each use, gently wash the cutter with warm soapy water and allow it to air dry completely before storing. Avoid exposing the cutter to high heat sources, as PLA can soften at elevated temperatures. With proper care, your cookie cutter will last for many baking sessions to come. Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight for maximum longevity.

Gift Ideas:
This Little Bird Cookie Cutter makes a wonderful gift for bakers, craft enthusiasts, and nature lovers alike. It is a perfect stocking stuffer for Christmas, a sweet addition to an Easter basket, or a thoughtful birthday gift for someone who loves spending time in the kitchen. Pair it with a cookie recipe card and some decorating sprinkles for a creative and personal gift set. It also makes an excellent party favor for bird-watching clubs, garden parties, baby showers with a nature theme, or springtime celebrations that call for something truly special and unique.

About Our Shop:
Every cookie cutter in our shop is handmade with love and attention to detail. We are a small-batch operation, meaning each item is 3D printed to order specifically for you. This allows us to maintain the highest quality standards while minimizing waste. Thank you for supporting our small creative business — we truly appreciate every order and hope our products bring joy to your kitchen and crafting projects!
